summary.shape_sentence: Morning push to highs failed into a sharp mid-day liquidation, then afternoon repair held below the morning range.

goat.note: Sharpest directional leg was the late-morning to noon selloff from the 27900s into the 27600s.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish behavior aligned with the failed late-morning high and breakdown/retest zones near 27850-27900.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish behavior appeared after the noon flush low and on afternoon higher-low defenses near 27720-27750.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply was respected around 27800-27820 in the afternoon and higher near 27900-27935 from the failed morning high.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand held near 27645-27680 after the flush and later around 27720-27740 during afternoon pullbacks.

time_markers.10am_blue: Recovery from the early dip was underway; price was pushing toward the morning upside leg around 27875-27900.
time_markers.12pm_red: Active liquidation near session lows, with expanded volatility and price pressing into the 27600s.
time_markers.2pm_green: Afternoon recovery had reached resistance near 27800-27815 and began to stall.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed firm off the lows but below the open at approximately 27779.75.

tags.banks_respected: Demand respected near 27645-27680; supply respected near 27800-27820.
tags.banks_broken: Morning support around 27840-27860 broke during the 11am selloff.

takeaway: Bearish failed-morning-high day with a sharp mid-day flush and controlled afternoon repair. Upside attempt rejected before lunch, demand defended after liquidation, but close failed to reclaim the open.
